title: 20 PCS Plastic Glasses, Clear Hard Plastics Cups,Plastic Cups Reusable, Iced Coffee Cup, Party Drinking Glasses Christmas Drink Cup for Beer Pool Party Picnic and BBQ（170ML）
features: 【Unbreakable Durability 】:Clear plastic cups hardness of glass and the lightness of plastic, the harder material allows you to use it without bending or spilling due to the high temperature inside the cup or too much grip, and it is not as fragile as glass, a higher quality product to better entertain your guests

【Premium Safe Materials 】: Drinking glasses made of food grade ps polystyrene, shatterproof, odorless and safer than traditional glass. Ideal for families with children, while still maintaining the elegant glass-like transparency
【Durable and Easy to Clean 】: These plastic tumblers for adults are sturdy and durable and will hold up on any surface. Wide mouth design makes cleaning easier and ensures hygiene when reused

【Perfect Size & Stability 】: Christmas drink cup tumblers available in ideal 170ml sizes with weighted bases that prevent tipping while being comfortable to hold. The hexagonal shape adds a stylish non-slip grip

【Party-Ready Versatility】 : Cups reusable perfect for all beverages (coffee, cocktails, beer, smoothies) and occasions (BBQs, weddings, camping). Stackable design saves space for storage and transport to events
